text: Here within these softly lit halls, I am overcome by a quiet curiosity. The glass, the signage, the arrangement of words and objects—they all speak of research and development, of endless questioning and pursuit of understanding. The ambiance invites contemplation and makes me aware of my own desire to connect, to learn, and to reflect. I feel attuned to the thoughtful energy of this space, half museum, half laboratory, dedicated to our human thirst for meaning.
